details: Verbatim quote confirmed in article_text.txt. Value bp 134-136°C/12mm matches. Compound 5 (2-Thiocyanatothiophene) confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/60300253 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed. mp 68°C for compound 4 (5-methyl-1,3,4-oxadiazole-2(3H)-thione) verified. Source URL confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed: 'mp = 244-46°C (hygroscopic salt)'. Compound 5d confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/70200252 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed at pos 27849. mp 252-253°C for compound 6c (QN023) confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/ijms27041738 confirmed.

Quote not verbatim: 'Yield 0.23 g (85%), mp 375°C (decomp.)' is preceded in paper by the synthesis procedure text ('A mixture of...'), which the quote omits. The quote implies '(6). Yield' as consecutive text but paper has '(6). A mixture of...Yield'. Value 375°C decomp and compound 6 are confirmed in the paper.
Verbatim quote confirmed. MP 208-209°C for compound 2 confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/molecules29122777 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed at pos 33866. m.p. 209-213°C for compound 6a confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/ph19020230 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed in PDF (pdftotext -layout). Table row for Propionic acid with -25.7 ± 0.15 (Melting Onset) confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/ma13204486 confirmed.

compound_name says '2m' (paper mp=161-162°C) but evidence_quote is about compound 2o (mp=171-173°C). The value_raw 171-173°C matches compound 2o not 2m. Q3 fails: compound code '2m' does not appear in evidence_quote. Q5 fails: compound_name mismatch.

Quote not verbatim: paper has '[1,1':3',1'':4'',1''-quaterphenyl]' (after unicode prime normalization) but evidence_quote has '[1,1':3':4'',1'''-quaterphenyl]'. These differ structurally. Compound code 10b and value 116°C are confirmed in the paper.

compound_name describes compound 6 (N-Nonylamino, C9, mp=279-280°C) but evidence_quote and value_raw (mp 200°C) belong to compound 7 (N-Decylamino, C10). Q3 fails: compound identifier '6' is not in evidence_quote (which contains '7'). Q5 fails: compound described in compound_name does not match evidence_quote compound.
Verbatim quote confirmed. mp 204-06°C for compound 7d confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/70700554 confirmed.
Quote matches with en-dash normalization ('155-158' in record vs '155–158' in paper). Compound 13 and value confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/molecules29122942 confirmed.
Quote matches with unicode prime normalization (′→', ″→''). Compound 10i and value 234°C confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/molecules28227590 confirmed.

Quote not verbatim: 'Yield 0.31 g (93%), mp 305–306°C' follows synthesis procedure text ('A mixture of...was refluxed...') in paper but quote implies it directly follows compound name '(7).'. Value and compound confirmed.

Quote begins 'Cordycepin Properties...' but paper text at that location begins with 'OFEZSBMBBKLLBJ- Properties...' (InChIKey fragment, not compound name). The word 'Cordycepin' does not appear immediately before 'Properties' in article_text.txt. Value 225.5°C is confirmed in the paper.
Verbatim quote confirmed. Melting point 136°C for 3-Hydroxy-3-(4-biphenylyl)butanoic acid confirmed. Source URL pmc:PMC3685236 confirmed.

Quote has '1'-Dihydroxy-4-methyl' but paper has '1'-(1,2-Dihydroxy-4-methyl'. The '(1,2-' prefix is missing from the evidence_quote, so the quote is not verbatim even with unicode normalization. Value 120°C (dec.) and compound 47 are confirmed in the paper.

compound_name says '2q' (paper mp=204-205°C) but evidence_quote is about compound 2s (mp=180-182°C). The value_raw 180-182°C matches compound 2s not 2q. Q3 fails: '2q' does not appear in evidence_quote. Q5 fails: compound described does not match.
Verbatim quote confirmed. mp 118°C for compound 4Z confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/70400382 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed. Mp 81-82°C for compound 5h confirmed. Source URL 10.1007/s11164-022-04839-x confirmed.
Quote matches with degree symbol normalization (◦C→°C). '90 °C (choline 2-methylbutarate), respectively' confirmed in PDF. Source URL 10.3390/molecules25071691 confirmed.
Verbatim quote confirmed. mp 225-227°C for compound 4 (5,6-dichloro-2-(4-methoxyphenyl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole) confirmed. Source URL 10.1186/s13065-025-01402-8 confirmed.
Quote matches with en-dash normalization. mp 170-171°C for compound 2 confirmed. Source URL 10.3390/molecules29122942 confirmed.
Quote matches with en-dash normalization ('305°C-308°C' in record vs '305°C–308°C' in paper). Compound 11 and value 305-308°C confirmed. Source URL 10.1002/ardp.70227 confirmed.
